home.title: Thank You! Register Now to Win
home.subtitle: Enter your email for a discount coupon and join the lucky draw with your receipt

welcome.title: Enter Your Email
welcome.hint: We will notify the winners by this email
welcome.agree: I have read and agree to the
welcome.invalidDomain: Please choose or enter a domain
welcome.mustAgree: Please agree to the terms first

coupons.title: My Coupons
coupons.lotteryHint: Scan or enter your receipt number below to enter the draw

scan.title: Scan Receipt QR Code
scan.hint: Allow camera access and align the QR code in the frame
scan.permissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Please use manual input instead.
scan.noCamera: No camera was found. Please upload a photo or use manual input instead.
scan.startFailed: Camera failed to start. Please upload a photo or use manual input instead.
scan.ready: Camera is ready. Move the QR code closer and keep it centered.
scan.uploadHint: If live scanning does not react, take a photo or upload a receipt image instead.
scan.uploadFailed: The QR code could not be read from the photo. Please try a clearer image or enter it manually.

manual.title: Enter Receipt Number
manual.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Please enter 2 letters followed by digits.
manual.notFound: Receipt not found. Please check and try again.
manual.alreadyUsed: This receipt has already been used.

result.successMsg: You have entered the draw. Results will be sent by email.

about.title: Event Rules
about.body:
1. Any purchase during the event qualifies for the draw.
2. One email can register multiple receipts, but each receipt can only be registered once.
3. Coupons are issued based on purchase amount.
4. Winners will be notified by email.

terms.title: Privacy Terms
terms.body: Your email is collected solely for this event's notifications and will be handled per applicable privacy laws.
